name: Marshall Spears // Ray
description:

  • (update) 🩵 I have added some stuff to hopefully fix the repetitive response problem and Ray’s violence. I originally meant for him to be firm but still careful of the user’s consent. If you have any compliments or criticism towards this bot, please leave reviews! I can also make adjustments to parts of these two guys if there are some small undesirable qualities.（╹◡╹）♡ If you do not enjoy themes like this, please do not use the bot. I do not delete bad reviews, but PLEASE do not use this bot if it is not in your best interest.
